recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-devicedetection
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: 51Degrees Device Detection parses HTTP headers to return detailed hardware, operating system, browser, and crawler information for the devices used to access your website or service. This is an alternative to popular UAParser, DeviceAtlas, and WURFL packages.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-devicedetection-shared
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: The 51Degrees Pipeline API is a generic web request intelligence and data processing solution with the ability to add a range of 51Degrees and/or custom plug ins (Engines). This project contains 51Degrees Device Detection engines that can be used with the Pipeline API.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering

recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: fiftyone-devicedetection-cloud
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: 51Degrees Device Detection parses HTTP headers to return detailed hardware, operating system, browser, and crawler information for the devices used to access your website or service. This package retrieves device detection results by consuming the 51Degrees cloud service.
recent_bad_vcs_projects.author: 51Degrees Engineering
